extensionName.message: AI Translator - Smart AI Translation (Hover, Select, Context Menu)
extensionName.description: Extension name shown in Chrome Web Store and browser toolbar.

extensionDescription.message: Instant AI translator. Hover, select, or right-click to translate any text. 50+ languages, dark mode, bilingual UI.
extensionDescription.description: Short description shown in Chrome Web Store listing (max 132 chars).

actionTitle.description: Tooltip shown when hovering the toolbar icon.

contextMenuTranslate.description: Right-click menu entry that appears on selected text.
